title: Torrrezx-Elemental swords
description: Replaces the swords with new element-themed swords
body:
Torrezx-Elemental swords

Español
Nuevas espadas elementales,fuego,agua,tierra,planta,electricidad y mucho mas!

English
New elemental swords: fire, water, earth, plant, electricity, and much more!

Rename in anvil-Renombra en un yunque :Swords to diamond-netherite-iron-copper for.
-Air sword

-Fire sword

-Earth sword

-Nature sword

-Lighning sword

-Water sword

-Metal sword

-Ice sword

-Poison sword

Requerimientos-Requirements:
-No requiere de ningún complemento-Does not require any complement
